title: HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained home visitors who coach families in parenting skills development. Clients also receive information on topics such as child development, infant care, child health, and information and referral for outside agencies. 435 NE Evans Street Suite A McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-3 months Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, evening home visits available by arrangement Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-4020 Main phone Main phone (503) 472-4020 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, ASL, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4pm Services: Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NW MCMINNVILLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY
